nuggets.text: Runway Free starts with 125 one-time credits, which the pricing page maps to about 25 seconds of Gen-4 Turbo generation.
The Free plan keeps a watermark and does not include Gen-4 video access.
Runway's security standards help article says uploaded assets are private by default and that SOC 2 Type II coverage applies across plans.
Runway's data-security page says customer content is protected with TLS 1.2 or higher in transit and AES-256 encryption at rest.
Runway's Enterprise Features help article lists SSO, organization and workspace controls, brand kits, enterprise analytics, and the ability to disable external link sharing.
Runway also describes Characters as a real-time video agent API for building custom conversational characters with control over voice, personality, knowledge, and actions.
Runway Standard includes 625 monthly credits, which the pricing page maps to 25 seconds of Gen-4.5 or 125 seconds of Gen-4 Turbo generation.
Standard plan access includes Aleph, Gen-4.5, Gen-4, Act-Two, Veo 3.1, and Veo 3.
Standard supports up to 5 users per workspace and 100GB of asset storage.
Pro expands the workspace limit to 10 users and 500GB of asset storage.
Paid plans include watermark removal, upscale resolution, and access to all video models.
Unlimited adds Explore Mode with unlimited generations at a relaxed rate.
Enterprise advertises single sign-on, advanced security and compliance, and workspace analytics.
Enterprise also lists configurable organization spaces and integration with internal tools.
